release_notes: Optional Local RAG & Knowledge Base dependencies for Raspberry Pi compatibility and faster Windows startup, integrated directly as an installable extra in the WebUI Plugins panel, and minor Javascript uninstallation bug fixes.

changes.note: Bumped version to 0.9.1.
Added v0.9.1 release notes.
Updated documentation for Local RAG features.
Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.9.1.
Added support for context-aware mentions in agent context.
Implemented KnowledgeManager for local RAG FAISS collections.
Integrated mentions system directives in the main agent execution loop.
Pass session mentions to child agents.
Added knowledge search tool for collection queries.
Expose knowledge base management CLI commands.
Updated config schema for local RAG.
Improved PowerShell detached updater script spawns.
Exposed API endpoints for Knowledge Base management.
Refactored connected apps router endpoints.
Added Knowledge Base API endpoints.
Support mentions and active KBs configuration in session routes.
Registered knowledge router and session event handlers.
Added styles for autocomplete mentions dropdown and active KB footer.
Added styling for collection UI dropzones and action buttons.
Refactored modal layouts.
Updated WebUI structure with KB manager container.
Decoupled auth UI handling.
Integrated mentions autocomplete and active KB manager.
Decoupled connected apps management functions.
Expose relative file management utilities.
Decoupled Knowledge Base frontend controller with CodeQL escaping fixes.
Added frontend logic for @ autocomplete mentions dropdown.
Modularized monolithic sidebar panel logic.
Helper utilities for element rendering.
Support knowledge collection update WebSocket events.
RAG plugin listing, installation, and uninstallation routers.
Expose RAG extra plugin in Plugins UI panel.
